name: E-8 standardized rule metadata: messages must be a hash {messageId: template}; arrays or scalars are rejected
command:
printf 'id: g-ts-308
type: problem
messages:
  - default
  - bad
' > g-ts-308.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rule-metadata-complete.sh" g-ts-308.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'messages: must be a hash {messageId: template}' err.txt && echo messages_hash 1>&2
